query: ok I've got the plan.md and tasks.md all set up from the planning phase. Can you go ahead and implement everything? The tasks are in ~/project/tasks.md and the plan is in ~/project/plan.md
I need to resume the implementation — I got through phase 1 and half of phase 2 yesterday before my laptop died. tasks.md has checkboxes showing what's done. Pick up where I left off
/implement-plan
We finished the planning step and create-tasks gave me a nice tasks.md. Now execute the plan phase by phase, starting with the database migrations in phase 1
I have an implementation plan ready to go — 4 phases, about 30 tasks. Run through it end to end, do the code review after each phase, and update the checkboxes as you complete things
the spec and plan are done (see plan.md in the repo root). implement it. make sure to run the tests as you go and don't skip the review step
continue implementing from tasks.md — phases 1-3 are done, phase 4 has the remaining API endpoints and the integration tests. checklist is in ux-checklist.md
I ran create-plan and create-tasks already. now i need you to actually build the thing. it's a Next.js app with a postgres backend, tasks are broken into 5 phases
pick up the implementation where we left off last session. the tasks file should show which ones are already checked off
execute the implementation plan in plan.md, doing TDD — write failing tests first for each task, then implement to make them pass
I need to create an implementation plan for adding OAuth2 support to our Express API. We need Google and GitHub providers, token refresh, and session management
can you break down this feature spec into tasks? I want phases for the database layer, API routes, and frontend components, with dependencies between them
review the code changes on this branch — focus on security issues in the auth middleware and check if the error handling is consistent with the rest of the codebase
refactor the user service to use the repository pattern. Right now the SQL queries are scattered across 3 controller files and it's getting messy
write a comprehensive test suite for the payment processing module. We need unit tests for the calculator, integration tests for the Stripe webhook handler, and edge cases for currency conversion
help me debug this failing CI pipeline — the TypeScript build passes locally but fails in GitHub Actions with a type error in src/api/routes.ts
I want to understand how the authentication flow works in this codebase. Walk me through the request lifecycle from login to token validation
set up a new React project with TypeScript, Tailwind, and Vitest. Include ESLint config and a basic folder structure with components/, hooks/, and utils/
analyze the performance of our database queries — I think the user search endpoint is slow because it's doing a full table scan. Can you check the query plan and suggest indexes?
I have a plan.md but I think it needs revisions — the phase ordering doesn't account for the fact that the frontend components depend on the API types being generated first. Can you fix the plan?
